visa_types.name: E - Temporary Stay Visa for accompanying family membrer (EN)
visa_types.documents_required: For checklist of documents required kindly click here.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:Student Visa]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CVE A is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of 4440 CVE per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
Important Notice:
Important update regarding the service fee payment by Portugal National Visa applicants:
- To reduce the no-show rate of applicants, online payment of a service fee of 4440 CVE is now a part of the appointment confirmation. Payment is completed via the Vinti4 portal.
- Advance payment of the service fee does not represent an additional cost for applicants, as the service fee paid earlier at the counter needs to be paid online for an appointment.
- Applicants would need to pay the consular fee while submitting the visa application at the VFS Global counter.
To schedule your appointment, visit: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login)
Register and create an account with our appointment system for login.
Enter the necessary details like name, surname etc., as required.
Accept the conditions and proceed to pay the service fees online.
Once directed to the Vinti4 payment gateway, make the payment with a valid bank card with sufficient balance.
Ensure your card is linked to your mail/phone number to complete the authorisation process.
Once the payment is successful, the Vinti4 page will automatically redirect to the VFS Global portal to view the appointment confirmation.
The appointment letter will be sent to your email address or can be downloaded directly from this page.
                               Please do not attempt to refresh the page or click the return/back button while being redirected.
If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time fot the application at the Embassy of Portugal is approximately 60 Days.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. 
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences
visa_types.forms: Applicant can Download or fill the form online here and print it.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This Visa is for temporary stay visa for accompanying family member holding temporary stay visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This Visa is for temporary stay visa for accompanying family member holding temporary stay visa.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Student Visa]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CVE A is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of 4440 CVE per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
Important Notice:
Important update regarding the service fee payment by Portugal National Visa applicants:
- To reduce the no-show rate of applicants, online payment of a service fee of 4440 CVE is now a part of the appointment confirmation. Payment is completed via the Vinti4 portal.
- Advance payment of the service fee does not represent an additional cost for applicants, as the service fee paid earlier at the counter needs to be paid online for an appointment.
- Applicants would need to pay the consular fee while submitting the visa application at the VFS Global counter.
To schedule your appointment, visit: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login)
Register and create an account with our appointment system for login.
Enter the necessary details like name, surname etc., as required.
Accept the conditions and proceed to pay the service fees online.
Once directed to the Vinti4 payment gateway, make the payment with a valid bank card with sufficient balance.
Ensure your card is linked to your mail/phone number to complete the authorisation process.
Once the payment is successful, the Vinti4 page will automatically redirect to the VFS Global portal to view the appointment confirmation.
The appointment letter will be sent to your email address or can be downloaded directly from this page.
                               Please do not attempt to refresh the page or click the return/back button while being redirected.
If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)

## Documents Required
For checklist of documents required kindly click here.

## Photo Specifications
Kindly Note that PHOTOBOOTH is available at VFS Application Center and Photos provided are as per the OACI specifications
PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
 The photographs must be:
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear
- Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
The photographs must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show your skin tones naturally
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast
- Be printed on high quality paper, and at high resolution Photographs taken with a digital camera must be high quality colour and printed on photo-quality paper.
Style and lighting
The photographs must be:
- Be colour neutral
- Show your eyes open and clearly visible-no hair across your eyes
- Show you facing square on to the camera, not looking over one shoulder (portrait style) or tilted, and showing both edges of your face clearly
- Be taken with a plain light-coloured background
- Be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections on your face and no red eye
Glasses and head covers
If you wear glasses:
- Be colour neutral
- the photograph must show your eyes clearly with no flash reflection off the glasses, and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames - wear lighter framed glasses if you have them)
- Make sure that the frames do not cover any part of your eyes.
Head coverings :
- Are not permitted except for religious reasons, but your facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown.
Expression and frame
Your photographs must:
- show you alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible), looking at the camera with a neutral expression and your mouth closed.

## Processing Time
The processing time fot the application at the Embassy of Portugal is approximately 60 Days.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. 
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

## Download Forms
Applicant can Download or fill the form online here and print it.

[Table:Student Visa]
Please Note:

If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sen/en/prt/travel-insurance).
Application form duly filled and signed you can download here (https://vistos.mne.gov.pt/images/formulario_visto_nacional_pt.pdf) or fill it online here and print it. 
For documents required kindly click here (https://praia.embaixadaportugal.mne.gov.pt/pt/vistos)

## Photo Specifications
Kindly Note that PHOTOBOOTH is available at VFS Application Center and Photos provided are as per the OACI specifications
PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
 The photographs must be:
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width

- Have appropriate brightness and contrast
- Be printed on high quality paper, and at high resolution Photographs taken with a digital camera must be high quality colour and printed on photo-quality paper.
Style and lighting
The photographs must be:
- Be colour neutral
- Show your eyes open and clearly visible-no hair across your eyes
- Show you facing square on to the camera, not looking over one shoulder (portrait style) or tilted, and showing both edges of your face clearly
- Be taken with a plain light-coloured background
- Be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections on your face and no red eye
Glasses and head covers
If you wear glasses:
- Be colour neutral
- the photograph must show your eyes clearly with no flash reflection off the glasses, and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames - wear lighter framed glasses if you have them)
- Make sure that the frames do not cover any part of your eyes.
Head coverings :
- Are not permitted except for religious reasons, but your facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown.
Expression and frame
Your photographs must:
- show you alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible), looking at the camera with a neutral expression and your mouth closed.

## Processing Time
The processing time for the National visa at the Embassy of Portugal depends on the processing time needed by the issuing authority.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

Applicants travelling for study purpose have to apply under this category.
For the time being all the application for National Visa, have to be logged directly with the embassy.

- show you alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible), looking at the camera with a neutral expression and your mouth closed.

## Processing Time
The processing time for the National visa at the Embassy of Portugal depends on the processing time needed by the issuing authority.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Applicants travelling for sports purpose have to apply under this category.
For the time being all the application for National Visa, have to be logged directly with the embassy.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Applicants travelling for sports purpose have to apply under this category.
For the time being all the application for National Visa, have to be logged directly with the embassy.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Student Visa]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CVE A is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of  4440 CVE per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable..
Important Notice:
Important update regarding the service fee payment by Portugal National Visa applicants:
- To reduce the no-show rate of applicants, online payment of a service fee of 4440 CVE is now a part of the appointment confirmation. Payment is completed via the Vinti4 portal.
- Advance payment of the service fee does not represent an additional cost for applicants, as the service fee paid earlier at the counter needs to be paid online for an appointment.
- Applicants would need to pay the consular fee while submitting the visa application at the VFS Global counter.
To schedule your appointment, visit: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login)
Register and create an account with our appointment system for login.
Enter the necessary details like name, surname etc., as required.
Accept the conditions and proceed to pay the service fees online.
Once directed to the Vinti4 payment gateway, make the payment with a valid bank card with sufficient balance.
Ensure your card is linked to your mail/phone number to complete the authorisation process.
Once the payment is successful, the Vinti4 page will automatically redirect to the VFS Global portal to view the appointment confirmation.
The appointment letter will be sent to your email address or can be downloaded directly from this page.
                               Please do not attempt to refresh the page or click the return/back button while being redirected.
If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)

## Documents Required
Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/sen/en/prt/travel-insurance).
Application form duly filled and signed you can download here (https://vistos.mne.gov.pt/images/formulario_visto_nacional_pt.pdf) or fill it online here and print it. 
For documents required kindly click here (https://praia.embaixadaportugal.mne.gov.pt/pt/vistos)

## Photo Specifications
Kindly Note that PHOTOBOOTH is available at VFS Application Center and Photos provided are as per the OACI specifications
PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
 The photographs must be:
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear
- Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
The photographs must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show your skin tones naturally
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast
- Be printed on high quality paper, and at high resolution Photographs taken with a digital camera must be high quality colour and printed on photo-quality paper.
Style and lighting
The photographs must be:
- Be colour neutral
- Show your eyes open and clearly visible-no hair across your eyes
- Show you facing square on to the camera, not looking over one shoulder (portrait style) or tilted, and showing both edges of your face clearly
- Be taken with a plain light-coloured background
- Be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections on your face and no red eye
Glasses and head covers
If you wear glasses:
- Be colour neutral
- the photograph must show your eyes clearly with no flash reflection off the glasses, and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames - wear lighter framed glasses if you have them)
- Make sure that the frames do not cover any part of your eyes.
Head coverings :
- Are not permitted except for religious reasons, but your facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown.
Expression and frame
Your photographs must:
- show you alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible), looking at the camera with a neutral expression and your mouth closed.

## Processing Time
The processing time for the National visa at the Embassy of Portugal depends on the processing time needed by the issuing authority.
Please be advised that due to the above-mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences 

## Download Forms
Applicant can Download or fill the form online here (https://vistos.mne.gov.pt/images/formulario_visto_nacional_pt.pdf) and print it.
Useful Forms can be Downloaded or filled here and print it.

The processing time fot the application at the Embassy of Portugal is approximately 60 Days.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. 
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

## Download Forms
Applicant can Download or fill the form online here and print it.

- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of 4440 CVE per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
Important Notice:
Important update regarding the service fee payment by Portugal National Visa applicants:
- To reduce the no-show rate of applicants, online payment of a service fee of 4440 CVE is now a part of the appointment confirmation. Payment is completed via the Vinti4 portal.
- Advance payment of the service fee does not represent an additional cost for applicants, as the service fee paid earlier at the counter needs to be paid online for an appointment.
- Applicants would need to pay the consular fee while submitting the visa application at the VFS Global counter.
To schedule your appointment, visit: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login)
Register and create an account with our appointment system for login.
Enter the necessary details like name, surname etc., as required.
Accept the conditions and proceed to pay the service fees online.
Once directed to the Vinti4 payment gateway, make the payment with a valid bank card with sufficient balance.
Ensure your card is linked to your mail/phone number to complete the authorisation process.
Once the payment is successful, the Vinti4 page will automatically redirect to the VFS Global portal to view the appointment confirmation.
The appointment letter will be sent to your email address or can be downloaded directly from this page.
                               Please do not attempt to refresh the page or click the return/back button while being redirected.
If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)

Overview
This Visa is for temporary stay visa for the exercise of professional activity done remotely” Digital Nomads”.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This Visa is for temporary stay visa for the exercise of professional activity done remotely” Digital Nomads”.

## Visa Fees

[Table:Student Visa]
Please Note: 
- The applicable visa fee in CVE A is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice due to sudden foreign exchange fluctuations.
- Applicant shall be levied a service charge of 4440 CVE per application over and above visa fees.
- All fees are non-refundable.
Important Notice:
Important update regarding the service fee payment by Portugal National Visa applicants:
- To reduce the no-show rate of applicants, online payment of a service fee of 4440 CVE is now a part of the appointment confirmation. Payment is completed via the Vinti4 portal.
- Advance payment of the service fee does not represent an additional cost for applicants, as the service fee paid earlier at the counter needs to be paid online for an appointment.
- Applicants would need to pay the consular fee while submitting the visa application at the VFS Global counter.
To schedule your appointment, visit: https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/cpv/en/prt/login)
Register and create an account with our appointment system for login.
Enter the necessary details like name, surname etc., as required.
Accept the conditions and proceed to pay the service fees online.
Once directed to the Vinti4 payment gateway, make the payment with a valid bank card with sufficient balance.
Ensure your card is linked to your mail/phone number to complete the authorisation process.
Once the payment is successful, the Vinti4 page will automatically redirect to the VFS Global portal to view the appointment confirmation.
The appointment letter will be sent to your email address or can be downloaded directly from this page.
                               Please do not attempt to refresh the page or click the return/back button while being redirected.
If the payment is successful, but you do not receive any appointment letter, please reach out by emailing us at portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com (mailto:portugal.visa.cv@vfsglobal.com)

## Documents Required
For checklist of documents required kindly click here.

## Photo Specifications
Kindly Note that PHOTOBOOTH is available at VFS Application Center and Photos provided are as per the OACI specifications
PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
 The photographs must be:
- No more than 6-months old
- 35-40mm in width
- Close up of your head and top of your shoulders so that your face takes up 70 -80% of the photograph
- In sharp focus and clear
- Of high quality with no ink marks or creases

PHOTOGRAPH QUALITY
The photographs must:
- Show you looking directly at the camera
- Show your skin tones naturally
- Have appropriate brightness and contrast
- Be printed on high quality paper, and at high resolution Photographs taken with a digital camera must be high quality colour and printed on photo-quality paper.
Style and lighting
The photographs must be:
- Be colour neutral
- Show your eyes open and clearly visible-no hair across your eyes
- Show you facing square on to the camera, not looking over one shoulder (portrait style) or tilted, and showing both edges of your face clearly
- Be taken with a plain light-coloured background
- Be taken with uniform lighting and not show shadows or flash reflections on your face and no red eye
Glasses and head covers
If you wear glasses:
- Be colour neutral
- the photograph must show your eyes clearly with no flash reflection off the glasses, and no tinted lenses (if possible, avoid heavy frames - wear lighter framed glasses if you have them)
- Make sure that the frames do not cover any part of your eyes.
Head coverings :
- Are not permitted except for religious reasons, but your facial features from bottom of chin to top of forehead and both edges of your face must be clearly shown.
Expression and frame
Your photographs must:
- show you alone (no chair backs, toys or other people visible), looking at the camera with a neutral expression and your mouth closed.

## Processing Time
The processing time fot the application at the Embassy of Portugal is approximately 60 Days.
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned minimum processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel. 
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

## Download Forms
Applicant can Download or fill the form online here and print it.
